description: Create and execute a containerized CI/CD pipeline for the Python Flask application located at ~/projects/webapp/. The pipeline must be orchestrated via an executable bash script named 'pipeline.sh' and include a production Dockerfile using 'python:3.11-slim' that runs as a non-root user with an image size under 200MB. The pipeline must perform linting (flake8 and bandit), testing (pytest with coverage), security scanning (Trivy), and final packaging of a 'webapp:production' image (listening on port 8000) verified via its /health endpoint. Ensure all artifacts are generated in the 'ci-output/' directory, including 'lint-report.txt', 'test-results.txt', 'coverage.txt', 'security-scan.txt', and 'pipeline-summary.txt'.
